claim: Verifier confirms explorer and cross-checker claims are evidence-backed with no assumptions presented as facts: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements boundary audit that detects project file mutations before and after full-tool Claude agent execution and blocks PRD readiness when violations occur or evidence lacks required scope declarations.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot and diffBoundarySnapshots implement SHA-256-based change detection. Both explorer and cross-checker verified at exact line numbers.
evidence.why: Core implementation evidence independently verified twice.

evidence.summary: BLOCKER_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker generation proves enforcement blocks PRD readiness. Cross-checker corrected line range from explorer's 516-572 to actual 585-594.
evidence.why: Enforcement mechanism independently verified with precise line correction.

evidence.summary: Three test cases cover git-backed boundary, non-git fallback, and mutation blocking. All tests assert BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers when mutations occur.
evidence.why: Test evidence proves boundary audit works across scenarios and actually blocks PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Real dispatch artifact shows clean execution with prd_ready: true and zero blockers when boundary passes. Both agents verified this artifact.
evidence.why: Production execution evidence proves system works in practice.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues validates scope field on every record. Verified by both agents.
evidence.why: Scope enforcement prevents ambiguous evidence sources.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues blocks project facts without project-scoped evidence. Verified by both agents.
evidence.why: Evidence classification enforcement prevents assumptions from becoming facts.

risks: Tool profile restrictions passed as CLI args are not independently verified at runtime; boundary audit is detection-only, not prevention.
Rapid write-then-delete sequences within execution window could theoretically evade snapshot timing, though this is a narrow race condition.

result.notes: Verifier confirms no assumptions promoted to facts. All 16 evidence records from explorer independently verified by cross-checker at exact line numbers. Evidence paths are valid project files with usable line ranges. Test coverage proves boundary detection and blocker generation. Real dispatch artifact proves clean execution. Two minor technical risks noted but do not block claim validity. PRD readiness requirements satisfied.
